    L

    lastLoss() - Method in record class org.deepj.ann.training.TrainingResult
    Returns the value of the lastLoss record component.
    Layer - Interface in org.deepj.ann.layers
    Differentiable module mapping Tensor -> Tensor.
    LayerNorm1D - Class in org.deepj.ann.layers.transformer
    LayerNorm over feature dimension (cols) with trainable gamma/beta exposed as Parameters.
    LayerNorm1D(int) - Constructor for class org.deepj.ann.layers.transformer.LayerNorm1D
     
    Linear - Class in org.deepj.ann.layers
    Fully-connected layer: y = xW + b x: [n x dIn], W: [dIn x dOut], b: [1 x dOut]
    Linear(int, int, Random) - Constructor for class org.deepj.ann.layers.Linear
     
    loss(Tensor, int[]) - Static method in class org.deepj.ann.loss.CrossEntropyLoss
    Convenience helper: compute loss from logits and int targets.
    loss(Tensor, Tensor) - Method in class org.deepj.ann.loss.CrossEntropyLoss
     
    loss(Tensor, Tensor) - Method in interface org.deepj.ann.loss.LossFunction
     
    loss(Tensor, Tensor) - Method in class org.deepj.ann.loss.MSELoss
     
    LossFunction - Interface in org.deepj.ann.loss
     
    lossMatchesSimpleCase() - Method in class org.deepj.ann.loss.CrossEntropyLossTest
